// note: Type-CHECKING only — the app ships as plain .js with no build step. tsc never emits; it just catches real mistakes (typos, undefined calls, bad arg counts) at write-time. Lenient on purpose so a vanilla codebase stays green without a TS migration.
// exclude-note: sw.js runs in the ServiceWorker global scope (self/clients/skipWaiting), which conflicts with the DOM Window lib used for the app files — checked separately would need its own config, so it's left out here.
